_comment: Real-SHAPE OpenAI Responses API payload for a P6 tuning interpret call. Hand-authored to match the wire shape (output[].content[].text carrying the strict-JSON advisor_response); scripts/tuning-llm-live-check.py overwrites this with a real captured response when run with a live key. Tests parse this exactly as jasper.calibration_agent.model_client does — no paid call.

content.text: {"artifact_schema_version":2,"kind":"jts_advisor_response","summary":"Your room has one clear problem in the bass: a peak of about 8.1 dB near 62 Hz, which is a room resonance. JTS placed a single cut there, and the re-measurement confirmed the room now tracks the target — the correction was accepted.","recommended_next_action":"Nothing more is needed; the correction is doing its job.","action_plan":[{"type":"explain","message":"The dip near your 80 Hz crossover was left alone on purpose — that is where your subwoofer hands off, not a room mode to boost.","reason":"","position_hint":"","rationale":"","profile_name":"","profile":{"enabled":false,"curve_id":"flat","simple_eq":{"sub_bass_db":0,"bass_db":0,"mid_db":0,"presence_db":0,"treble_db":0},"parametric_bands":[]},"correction_peqs":[],"target_id":"","warmth":0.0}]}
